title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Jindal Steel & Power

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Jindal Steel & Power
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Jindal Steel & Power in Bengaluru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Jindal Steel & Power:
Jindal Steel & Power is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jindal Steel & Power!
